title: Link monday boards between workspaces
excerpt:
Hey all, 
I’d like to link monday boards between workspaces: Is that even possible? And how could I do that? 
Thank you!

posts.author: Sebastian (Apel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all,

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sebastian,

Did you try it? This is absolutely possible and in fact there’s no real difference in the process.

posts.cookedHtml: Hey, thank you! I just wasn’t looking properly.
